preview.title: Result Preview
preview.refreshNotice: Image generation is in progress. Please do not refresh this page or close the current tab.
preview.clickToZoom: Click the image to open a larger preview

status.idle: Waiting for generation. Results will appear here.
status.generating: Generating image. Results will appear here when ready.
status.ready: Preview updated. You can view it larger or download it.

empty.gptImageDescription: Generate or edit on the left. Completed images will be shown here for preview and download.
empty.gptImage2Description: Standard Image API image results will be shown here after generation.
empty.gpt54Description: gpt-5.4 generation or edit results will appear here after each turn.
empty.nanoBananaTitle: Nano Banana results will appear here
empty.nanoBananaDescription: Submit a prompt on the left, then preview the generated Gemini image here.
empty.fluxDescription: Configure Flux on the left. The generated or edited image will appear here when ready.

audio.subtitle: Convert audio to text using Whisper and GPT-4o models, with word-level sync and speaker diarization
audio.temperatureHint: Higher temperature makes output more random
audio.promptPlaceholder: Optional prompt to guide the model's style or continue a previous audio segment...
audio.syncTip: Use Verbose JSON format with Word timestamp granularity enabled for word-level synchronized subtitles
audio.speakerHint: Add up to 4 known speakers to help identify specific people

models.whisper1Desc: Classic Whisper model, multilingual with timestamps
models.gpt4oTranscribeDiarizeDesc: GPT-4o transcription model with speaker diarization

dalle.title: DALL·E Image Generation
dalle.subtitle: Generate and edit images using OpenAI's DALL·E and GPT Image models

gptImage2.title: gpt-image-2 Image
gptImage2.description: Standard image generation with the Image API parameter set.

gpt54.title: gpt-5.4 Image
gpt54.description: Uses the Responses API to call GPT Image 2, with page-local multi-turn follow-up support.

responses.apiModeHint: Image API keeps the current generation and edit flow. Responses API uses gpt-5.4 to call GPT Image 2 with page-local follow-up turns.
responses.modelDescription: Uses the Responses API to call GPT Image 2 through gpt-5.4, with page-local multi-turn follow-up support.
responses.zetaTokenWarning: ZetaTechs API users should use an openai/codex group token (API Key).
responses.modeHint: The first generate request starts a new image conversation in this page.
responses.modeHintEdit: The first edit request starts a new image-edit conversation in this page.
responses.continuationHint: The next generate request will continue from the previous successful Responses API turn in this page.
responses.continuationHintEdit: The next edit request will continue from the previous successful Responses API turn in this page.
responses.editModeHint: Responses edit supports uploaded images, image URLs, and Files API file IDs. Masks apply to the first input image.

errors.endpointUnsupported: The current endpoint does not appear to support the Responses API.
errors.modelUnsupported: The current endpoint does not appear to support gpt-5.4 image generation.
errors.toolUnsupported: The current endpoint or model does not appear to support the image_generation tool.
errors.noImageGenerationCall: The Responses API response did not include an image_generation_call output item.
errors.noImageResult: The Responses API response included image_generation_call output, but no image result was returned.

dalle.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate...
dalle.referenceImagesRequired: Upload at least one reference image to edit
dalle.referenceImageUrlsRequired: Enter at least one reference image URL to edit
dalle.referenceImageUrlsHint: Enter one HTTPS image URL per line, up to 10 images
dalle.referenceImageFileIdsRequired: Enter at least one Files API file ID to edit
dalle.referenceImageFileIdsHint: Enter one OpenAI Files API image file ID per line, up to 10 images

maskEditor.title: Visual mask editor
maskEditor.subtitle: Paint the area you want the model to redraw. Red areas will be edited.
maskEditor.scopeHint: The mask applies only to the first reference image. If you upload multiple references, put the locally edited image first.
maskEditor.noReference: Upload a reference image to draw a mask here.
maskEditor.exportHint: On submit, the editor exports a PNG mask with the same dimensions as the first reference image. Red areas become transparent alpha regions.
maskEditor.fallbackHint: If no visual mask is drawn, the uploaded PNG mask will be used.
maskEditor.fallbackActive: The uploaded mask will be used unless you draw a visual mask, which takes priority.
maskEditor.emptyMaskWarning: Draw a mask area before downloading.
maskEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load the reference image, so the mask editor could not initialize
maskEditor.referenceLoadFailed: Failed to load the image, so the edit request could not be prepared
maskEditor.referenceConvertFailed: Failed to convert the reference image to PNG, so the edit request could not be submitted
maskEditor.maskSizeMismatch: Mask dimensions must exactly match the first reference image. Redraw or upload a matching mask.

dalle.customSizeHint: For gpt-image-2, custom sizes must be multiples of 16, max edge 3840, max ratio 3:1, and between 655,360 and 8,294,400 pixels.

customSizeConstraints.multipleOf16: Both edges must be multiples of 16
customSizeConstraints.maxEdge: Longest edge must be 3840px or less
customSizeConstraints.aspectRatio: Long edge to short edge ratio must be 3:1 or less
customSizeConstraints.pixelRange: Total pixels must stay within the supported range

dalle.customSizeRequired: Enter a custom image size before submitting
dalle.customSizeFormatHint: Custom size must use the format WIDTHxHEIGHT, for example 2048x1152
dalle.customSizeMultipleOf16: Custom size width and height must both be multiples of 16
dalle.customSizeMaxEdge: Custom size cannot exceed 3840px on either edge
dalle.customSizeAspectRatio: Custom size aspect ratio cannot exceed 3:1
dalle.customSizePixelRange: Custom size must contain between 655,360 and 8,294,400 pixels
dalle.transparentBackgroundNotSupported: gpt-image-2 does not support transparent backgrounds; switched to Auto.
dalle.emptyResponse: The API did not return a usable image. Check the model, parameters, or server compatibility.
dalle.networkFailure: The image generation request failed at the browser network layer after {seconds} seconds. Endpoint: {endpoint}. Original error: {message}. This usually means CORS, a gateway timeout, or a connection closed mid-request. The client now uses streaming generation for gpt-image-2 to reduce long-request timeouts; if it still fails, check whether the API gateway supports long-lived and streaming responses.
dalle.waitingForPrompt: Enter a prompt and click generate...
